focus: Full mechanical sweep of every agent_file/agent_availability block across all 62 workflow YAMLs beyond /create, /deep, and /speckit families

label: Speckit family's 12 [runtime_agent_path] token sites across 6 workflow YAMLs have no runtime_agent_path_resolution: block defined anywhere, and no code-level resolver exists in the repo

cli-opencode framed as a standalone top-level skill in 4 sites (deep_research_auto.yaml:1016, deep_research_confirm.yaml:765, deep_review_auto.yaml:1073, deep_review_confirm.yaml:840), not just the 2 recon-seeded lines; actual SKILL.md is nested under cli-external/cli-opencode/
Deep family's 4 agent_file: sites are documentation-only (dispatch uses bare agent: name), a different semantic than create/speckit's live-interpolated agent_file:, risking future miscorrection
Every agent_file: literal-name reference across all 62 command workflow YAMLs must resolve to a basename present in both .claude/agents/ and .opencode/agents/

Every [runtime_agent_path] token usage in a workflow YAML must be paired with a runtime_agent_path_resolution: block in that same file (no cross-file/shared-include mechanism exists in this YAML dialect)

direction: speckit family's [runtime_agent_path] usage resolving via some undiscovered shared/global convention outside the local file
reason: exhaustive grep for runtime_agent_path_resolution: as a defining key across .opencode/commands and .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit found it only in the 14 /create family files; no YAML include/anchor/extends mechanism exists in this codebase, and no .ts/.js/.cjs/.mjs file anywhere implements a runtime_agent_path resolver

direction: additional dead literal agent-name classes beyond speckit.md and write.md existing anywhere in the 62-yaml surface
reason: every literal agent basename referenced (context.md, speckit.md, write.md, deep-research.md, review.md, debug.md) was cross-checked against the live 12-agent inventory in both .claude/agents/ and .opencode/agents/; only speckit.md (2 sites) and write.md (6 sites), both already found in iterations 5/7, are dead

direction: design, doctor, or memory command families containing any dead or live agent-dispatch declarations
reason: grep -rln for agent_file:/agent_availability across .opencode/commands/design, .opencode/commands/doctor, .opencode/commands/memory (all YAML assets) returns zero hits -- these families never declare agent dispatch of any kind
